title: pelargonium patulum
intro: Pelargonium patulum, also known as the Cape Geranium or Rose Geranium, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium patulum include reducing stress, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to reduce fever and treat wounds. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium patulum include teas, infusions, and essential oils that can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
